title: Xtra Crispy Chinese Tempeh Baozi
description: A buttery and snappy Chinese dish featuring tempeh, smoke-cold, and nut-free-friendly, formed into baozi, providing an energizing meal option.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add in water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat a steamer basket over boiling water.
Punch down the dough and divide it into 8 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a ball and then flatten it into a disk shape.
Place a few pieces of tempeh in the center of each disk, brush the edges with sesame oil, and fold the dough over to form a baozi.
Place the baozi in the steamer basket, leaving some space between each one.
Steam the baozi for 15 minutes, then brush the tops with vegetable oil and soy sauce.
Serve the baozi hot, garnished with chopped scallions.
